sources: Stats NZ Territorial Authority 2023 (FeatureServer) — all 67 district/city council boundaries
Stats NZ Urban Rural Areas 2023 (FeatureServer) — selected city/town outlines
Stats NZ Statistical Area 2 2023 (FeatureServer) — suburb/neighbourhood outlines under cities
MBIE Tenancy Services — Rental bond data by territorial authority
MBIE Market Rent API — SA2 / finer areas for future rent series
HUD Local Housing Statistics — median sale price & multiple by TA
Stats NZ LEED / BED — mean & median filled-job earnings (fixtures until live ingest)
Stats NZ LEED age-group earnings — career-stage proxy (not years of experience)
notes: Districts view includes every Stats NZ Territorial Authority 2023 (67 TAs). Map fills and ranked table use the same complete set — no patchy subset. Cities/towns are a curated Urban Rural subset for the explorer; suburbs are SA2 units under those cities. Boundaries are generalised for web size. Metrics for many TAs remain seeded fixtures until HUD/MBIE parsers replace them.
